name: Fettuccine with Black Bean-And-Garlic Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup diced tomatoes (fresh) or canned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté garlic, onion, and carrot in oil until soft.
2. Add 2 tablespoons V-8 juice to the saucepan.
3. Puree the garlic mixture with half of the black beans using a food processor or blender.
4. In a bowl, combine the remaining black beans and bean puree. Add the remaining V-8 juice and green onions.
5. Return the mixture to the saucepan and cook over medium-low heat until heated through, about 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Serve over cooked fettuccine pasta. Garnish with cilantro and diced tomatoes.
Note: Can be frozen.
